list.name: Changes
list.comment: Enrich bytecode disassembly via single decoder + verbose options - CodePrinter now parses via InstructionFactory + renders via InstructionRenderer visitor (drops duplicate 542-line decoder, debug logs, dead helpers) - Add DisassemblyOptions (terse default = byte-identical legacy; verbose = all enrichments) + CodeAttribute.prettyPrintCode(options) - Verbose: resolved invokedynamic + bootstrap, line numbers, local names/types, stack-frame markers, exception table with resolved catch types - Centralize CP-reference resolution in ConstPoolFormat - Fix invokedynamic/invokeinterface resolution (were mislabeled/UnknownReference) - Fix latent bugs: empty InvokeStaticInstruction.accept(), JSR_W crash, NewArray bad-atype crash, wide loads mis-modeled as ILoadInstruction, UnknownInstruction zero-fill write() corruption, getLength()/factory log spam - Update docs

task.summary: - Fixed issues with SSA lowering for bootstrap args for condy
- cleanup
- fixed for look edge detection for AST IR and source emission
- fixed local scoping issues
- fixed local scoping issues

- Guard clause detection - Added pattern detection for early-exit conditionals - AND chain merging - Nested if statements without else branches are now combined into && conditions - Spurious block removal - Unnecessary nested { } blocks are now flattened during emission

- Guard clause detection - Added pattern detection for early-exit conditionals - AND chain merging - Nested if statements without else branches are now combined into && conditions - Spurious block removal - Unnecessary nested { } blocks are now flattened during emission
- Fixed issues with scope, guard recovery, and local inlining
- Fixes to statement recovery
- Fixes to statement recovery p2
- Fixes to statement recovery p2
Default task
- Expand SSA->LLVM backend to full Java construct set via runtime ABI
- Add LLVM IR -> SSA lifter for round-trip optimizer integration
- params need to be created before body values
- Add DynamicConstant support to LLVM lowering
- Fix decompiler artifacts on flat methods and lambdas
- Fix variable fragmentation across exception edges and read-modify-write
- unqualified field resolution
- YABR fixes for source lowering: unqualified static self-calls, arithmetic type inference, and field ++/-- typing.

Recompile: resolve own-class & cross-class refs, fix lambda lowering, member emit/remov - Resolve unqualified own-class field refs and static self-calls - Resolve simple type names against the loaded pool (same-package + java.lang), fixing field/owner resolution (e.g. MainFrame.IDK_LOL) - Infer arithmetic/increment/array-capture types from operands - Lambda target-typing + SAM resolution, with correct owner and invokeinterface (kind + count byte) - Full-body lambda capture detection + synthetic emission infra
- RegisterAllocator.java — interference-guarded phi coalescing (intervalByValue map + interferes() + guard in buildPhiCoalescingMap).
- Fix loop-variable miscompilation, support multi-var declarations, tidy codegen

- Codegen: emit single-use literal constants inline at their use site (iconst/ldc) instead of materializing them to a local slot and reloading. Matches javac, shrinks bytecode, and removes the spurious slot variables that round-tripped as `boolean localN = true`.
- Decompiler: attribute a loop-header phi to its own home slot rather than the first store-use of its result, so a body copy like `a = b`no longer conflates the two variables or drops the body store.

Keep single-use values on the stack; drop dead field read on inc/dec - Codegen: fix isSimpleOperand so a single-use value feeding a comparison (e.g. i*i in i*i <= n) stays stack-resident instead of spilling to a scratch slot the decompiler then mangled. - Lowering: dispatch inc/dec before lowerUnary's eager operand lowering so a field increment reads the field once, not twice.
- don't un-materialize a value already emitted as an array-initializer declaration; reference the temp instead.

Java 21 pattern switch: decompile + recompile - Decompile: reconstruct type-pattern, record-deconstruction, and guarded (when) arms from typeSwitch. Strip synthetic MatchException handlers, force the $pc$ dispatch form for guard restart loops, fold pass/failstates. - Recompile: parse pattern/guard/deconstruction case labels and lower them to a SwitchBootstraps.typeSwitch indy + dispatch (restart loop for guards,accessor decls for deconstruction). Emit case-type Class bootstrap args. - Also fixes: BinaryOp/UnaryOp results feeding a declared merge phi were dropped; nested-class names now render Outer.Inner not Outer$Inner.
- Bytecode editor: branch widening, indy graft, clone alignment
- Fixed: standard UTF-8 was used for CONSTANT_Utf8 instead of JVMS modified UTF-8

- CodeWriter: handle-keyed insertBefore/insertAfter/removeInstruction/replaceInstruction/replaceBody + cloneRange/cloneRangeWithTargets, all via a relink pass (branch/switch retarget, branch widening, exception table, frame regen). New ConstPoolRemapper + MethodGrafter for cross-pool method grafting (incl. invokedynamic bootstraps); ClassFile.redirectOwner and stripStackMapTables. Local-var clones use the narrowest encoding.
- Fix CONSTANT_Utf8 to use JVMS modified UTF-8 (read + write) and FrameGenerator goto_w target computation.

Detached snippet assembly + cloned-range inlining primitives - CodeBuilder.detached()/assemble() produces a spliceable ClonedRange: invokedynamic (bootstrap added to the target's BootstrapMethods), try/catch, and branches into the host via externalLabel/bindLabel or a tail continuation label. - CodeWriter: exception-table relink is now identity-based (fixes host table corruption when a spliced block's offsets collide on insert); max_stack is computed over the CFG via FrameGenerator (computeMaxStack, applied in relink + write) so handler/loop peaks no longer under-count; cloneRangeWithTargets carries out-of-range branch targets by identity (same-method, guarded loud against cross-method misuse); ClonedRange.redirectReturns() turns cloned returns into continuation exits and insertChainBefore folds several bodies without the skip hazard. - ClassFile.addBootstrapMethod/getBootstrapMethodsAttribute (ConstPoolRemapper now delegates to them). New tests: CodeBuilderSnippetTest, CodeBuilderExternalBranchTest, MaxStackTest, ClonedRangeExitsTest.

Complete class-ref redirect, list view, lookups, InvokeInsn
redirectClassReferences(ConstPool/ClassFile) canonicalizes every reference to a class — bare CONSTANT_Class operands (new/checkcast/instanceof/anewarray), catch_type, member-ref owners, indy bootstrap classes, and L<name>; tokens in descriptors — so no live constant names the old class after a relocate/merge.
redirectOwner now delegates to it (was member-ref-only; left dangling operand refs that VerifyError'd on use). Generic Signature attrs stay out of scope (Renamer's job). Drops the now-dead memberRef{,Set}ClassIndex helpers.
Added: - CodeWriter.getInstructionList() — offset-ordered, identity-indexed snapshot - ClassFile.getMethod(name[, desc]) / getMethods(name) / getConstructors() / getStaticInitializer() / getField(name) / getInterfaceNames() - InvokeInsn interface implemented by the four owner-bearing invokes (not invokedynamic), so call sites can extract the callee uniformly
- constant guard for force inlining

Enrich bytecode disassembly via single decoder + verbose options - CodePrinter now parses via InstructionFactory + renders via InstructionRenderer visitor (drops duplicate 542-line decoder, debug logs, dead helpers) - Add DisassemblyOptions (terse default = byte-identical legacy; verbose = all enrichments) + CodeAttribute.prettyPrintCode(options) - Verbose: resolved invokedynamic + bootstrap, line numbers, local names/types, stack-frame markers, exception table with resolved catch types - Centralize CP-reference resolution in ConstPoolFormat - Fix invokedynamic/invokeinterface resolution (were mislabeled/UnknownReference) - Fix latent bugs: empty InvokeStaticInstruction.accept(), JSR_W crash, NewArray bad-atype crash, wide loads mis-modeled as ILoadInstruction, UnknownInstruction zero-fill write() corruption, getLength()/factory log spam - Update docs

MESSAGE.value: - Fixes to statement recovery
- Fixes to statement recovery p2
- Expand SSA->LLVM backend to full Java construct set via runtime ABI
- Add LLVM IR -> SSA lifter for round-trip optimizer integration
- params need to be created before body values
- Add DynamicConstant support to LLVM lowering
- Fix decompiler artifacts on flat methods and lambdas
- Fix variable fragmentation across exception edges and read-modify-write
- unqualified field resolution
- YABR fixes for source lowering: unqualified static self-calls, arithmetic type inference, and field ++/-- typing.

Recompile: resolve own-class & cross-class refs, fix lambda lowering, member emit/remov - Resolve unqualified own-class field refs and static self-calls - Resolve simple type names against the loaded pool (same-package + java.lang), fixing field/owner resolution (e.g. MainFrame.IDK_LOL) - Infer arithmetic/increment/array-capture types from operands - Lambda target-typing + SAM resolution, with correct owner and invokeinterface (kind + count byte) - Full-body lambda capture detection + synthetic emission infra
- RegisterAllocator.java — interference-guarded phi coalescing (intervalByValue map + interferes() + guard in buildPhiCoalescingMap).
- Fix loop-variable miscompilation, support multi-var declarations, tidy codegen

- Codegen: emit single-use literal constants inline at their use site (iconst/ldc) instead of materializing them to a local slot and reloading. Matches javac, shrinks bytecode, and removes the spurious slot variables that round-tripped as `boolean localN = true`.
- Decompiler: attribute a loop-header phi to its own home slot rather than the first store-use of its result, so a body copy like `a = b`no longer conflates the two variables or drops the body store.

Keep single-use values on the stack; drop dead field read on inc/dec - Codegen: fix isSimpleOperand so a single-use value feeding a comparison (e.g. i*i in i*i <= n) stays stack-resident instead of spilling to a scratch slot the decompiler then mangled. - Lowering: dispatch inc/dec before lowerUnary's eager operand lowering so a field increment reads the field once, not twice.
- don't un-materialize a value already emitted as an array-initializer declaration; reference the temp instead.

Java 21 pattern switch: decompile + recompile - Decompile: reconstruct type-pattern, record-deconstruction, and guarded (when) arms from typeSwitch. Strip synthetic MatchException handlers, force the $pc$ dispatch form for guard restart loops, fold pass/failstates. - Recompile: parse pattern/guard/deconstruction case labels and lower them to a SwitchBootstraps.typeSwitch indy + dispatch (restart loop for guards,accessor decls for deconstruction). Emit case-type Class bootstrap args. - Also fixes: BinaryOp/UnaryOp results feeding a declared merge phi were dropped; nested-class names now render Outer.Inner not Outer$Inner.
- Bytecode editor: branch widening, indy graft, clone alignment
- Fixed: standard UTF-8 was used for CONSTANT_Utf8 instead of JVMS modified UTF-8

- CodeWriter: handle-keyed insertBefore/insertAfter/removeInstruction/replaceInstruction/replaceBody + cloneRange/cloneRangeWithTargets, all via a relink pass (branch/switch retarget, branch widening, exception table, frame regen). New ConstPoolRemapper + MethodGrafter for cross-pool method grafting (incl. invokedynamic bootstraps); ClassFile.redirectOwner and stripStackMapTables. Local-var clones use the narrowest encoding.
- Fix CONSTANT_Utf8 to use JVMS modified UTF-8 (read + write) and FrameGenerator goto_w target computation.

Detached snippet assembly + cloned-range inlining primitives - CodeBuilder.detached()/assemble() produces a spliceable ClonedRange: invokedynamic (bootstrap added to the target's BootstrapMethods), try/catch, and branches into the host via externalLabel/bindLabel or a tail continuation label. - CodeWriter: exception-table relink is now identity-based (fixes host table corruption when a spliced block's offsets collide on insert); max_stack is computed over the CFG via FrameGenerator (computeMaxStack, applied in relink + write) so handler/loop peaks no longer under-count; cloneRangeWithTargets carries out-of-range branch targets by identity (same-method, guarded loud against cross-method misuse); ClonedRange.redirectReturns() turns cloned returns into continuation exits and insertChainBefore folds several bodies without the skip hazard. - ClassFile.addBootstrapMethod/getBootstrapMethodsAttribute (ConstPoolRemapper now delegates to them). New tests: CodeBuilderSnippetTest, CodeBuilderExternalBranchTest, MaxStackTest, ClonedRangeExitsTest.

Complete class-ref redirect, list view, lookups, InvokeInsn
redirectClassReferences(ConstPool/ClassFile) canonicalizes every reference to a class — bare CONSTANT_Class operands (new/checkcast/instanceof/anewarray), catch_type, member-ref owners, indy bootstrap classes, and L<name>; tokens in descriptors — so no live constant names the old class after a relocate/merge.
redirectOwner now delegates to it (was member-ref-only; left dangling operand refs that VerifyError'd on use). Generic Signature attrs stay out of scope (Renamer's job). Drops the now-dead memberRef{,Set}ClassIndex helpers.
Added: - CodeWriter.getInstructionList() — offset-ordered, identity-indexed snapshot - ClassFile.getMethod(name[, desc]) / getMethods(name) / getConstructors() / getStaticInitializer() / getField(name) / getInterfaceNames() - InvokeInsn interface implemented by the four owner-bearing invokes (not invokedynamic), so call sites can extract the callee uniformly
- constant guard for force inlining

Enrich bytecode disassembly via single decoder + verbose options - CodePrinter now parses via InstructionFactory + renders via InstructionRenderer visitor (drops duplicate 542-line decoder, debug logs, dead helpers) - Add DisassemblyOptions (terse default = byte-identical legacy; verbose = all enrichments) + CodeAttribute.prettyPrintCode(options) - Verbose: resolved invokedynamic + bootstrap, line numbers, local names/types, stack-frame markers, exception table with resolved catch types - Centralize CP-reference resolution in ConstPoolFormat - Fix invokedynamic/invokeinterface resolution (were mislabeled/UnknownReference) - Fix latent bugs: empty InvokeStaticInstruction.accept(), JSR_W crash, NewArray bad-atype crash, wide loads mis-modeled as ILoadInstruction, UnknownInstruction zero-fill write() corruption, getLength()/factory log spam

Enrich bytecode disassembly via single decoder + verbose options - CodePrinter now parses via InstructionFactory + renders via InstructionRenderer visitor (drops duplicate 542-line decoder, debug logs, dead helpers) - Add DisassemblyOptions (terse default = byte-identical legacy; verbose = all enrichments) + CodeAttribute.prettyPrintCode(options) - Verbose: resolved invokedynamic + bootstrap, line numbers, local names/types, stack-frame markers, exception table with resolved catch types - Centralize CP-reference resolution in ConstPoolFormat - Fix invokedynamic/invokeinterface resolution (were mislabeled/UnknownReference) - Fix latent bugs: empty InvokeStaticInstruction.accept(), JSR_W crash, NewArray bad-atype crash, wide loads mis-modeled as ILoadInstruction, UnknownInstruction zero-fill write() corruption, getLength()/factory log spam - Update docs

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Enrich bytecode disassembly via single decoder + verbose options - CodePrinter now parses via InstructionFactory + renders via InstructionRenderer visitor (drops duplicate 542-line decoder, debug logs, dead helpers) - Add DisassemblyOptions (terse default = byte-identical legacy; verbose = all enrichments) + CodeAttribute.prettyPrintCode(options) - Verbose: resolved invokedynamic + bootstrap, line numbers, local names/types, stack-frame markers, exception table with resolved catch types - Centralize CP-reference resolution in ConstPoolFormat - Fix invokedynamic/invokeinterface resolution (were mislabeled/UnknownReference) - Fix latent bugs: empty InvokeStaticInstruction.accept(), JSR_W crash, NewArray bad-atype crash, wide loads mis-modeled as ILoadInstruction, UnknownInstruction zero-fill write() corruption, getLength()/factory log spam - Update docs
